keyFindings.description: PR has merge conflicts with main (CONFLICTING). Implementer must rebase before merge.
getModelOverlay _options parameter accepted but never used — misleading API surface. Remove or document.
Redundant null check at line 259 — sessionID already guarded at line 252. Dead code suggests unclear control flow.
AllModelsFailed error class not re-exported from barrel file, unlike related types.
setTimeout(100) for fire-and-forget startPrompt timing is fragile.
mergeRetry and applyDefaults correctly preserve fallbackModels — good handling of tricky part.
